word: H119 - אָדַם - ʼâdam - aw-dam' - Be made red

sections.paragraph:
Original: אדם

Transliteration: 'âdam

Phonetic: aw-dam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be red, red
    1. (Qal) ruddy (of Nazarites)
    2. (Pual)
      1. to be rubbed red
      2. dyed red
      3. reddened
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to show red
      2. to glare
      3. to emit (show) redness
    4. (Hithpael)
      1. to redden
      2. to grow red
      3. to look red

Origin: of unknown derivation

TWOT entry: 26b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
